---
name: New skill proposal
about: Propose a new skill (OOP pattern, language layout, anti-pattern, etc.)
title: "[skill] "
labels: skill, enhancement
---

## Skill name

Proposed file path: `skills/<category>/<kebab-case-name>.md`

Category (pick one):

- [ ] `skills/oop/domain-model.md` — Aggregate, Value Object, Domain Event
- [ ] `skills/oop/use-case-boundary.md` — use case and port boundaries
- [ ] `skills/lang/backend-stack.md` — backend stack selection
- [ ] `skills/skeleton/backend-skeleton.md` — backend package structure / skeleton
- [ ] `skills/workflow/` — process stage
- [ ] other: _____

## What concept does this teach

One sentence. If you need two, split into two skills.

## When should an agent reach for this skill

The trigger condition. What the user is asking for or what state the codebase is in.

## Why does this deserve a separate skill

- Why not extend an existing skill?
- Why not put this in `AGENTS.md`?

## Checklist (sketch)

What measurable items will the skill enforce? 5–10 bullets is ideal.

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## What's forbidden (sketch)

The most valuable part of a skill — what should the agent *not* do?

-
-

## Will it fit in 200 lines?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Maybe — if not, what's the natural split?

## Related skills

Links to existing skills this one would cross-reference.
